sections.projects: Smart Hospital Patient Monitoring SystemSituation:Manual monitoring of patient vital signs was time-consuming and inefficient.Task:Design and develop a real-time IoT-based patient monitoringsystem with a live dashboard.Action:Simulated sensor data for heart rate, SpO₂, and temperature usingPython.Processed and analyzed data using rolling averages and thresholdchecks.Built an interactive monitoring dashboard using Streamlit.Result:Enabled real-time visualization of patient health data.Improved early detection of abnormal health conditions.Strengthened practical knowledge of Python, IoT, and datavisualization. Handwritten Digit Classifier Project Situation: Manual identification of handwritten digits is time-consumingand prone to errors.Task: Design and develop an automated handwritten digit recognitionsystem using machine learning.Action:Preprocessed and trained a machine learning model using theMNIST dataset.Built a GUI application in Python to upload and processhandwritten digit images.Implemented prediction logic to classify digits accurately in realtime.Result:Enabled fast and accurate handwritten digit recognition.Reduced manual effort and increased prediction reliability.Strengthened practical knowledge of Python, machine learning,and GUI development. Machine Learning Approaches for Predicting Disease-Associated Genetic Variants
